name: Sweet & Hot Corned Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Place corned beef in a large, heavy pot; cover with water.
2. Pierce the onion several times and add it along with the cloves, peppercorns, garlic, and chilies to the pot.
3. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Reduce heat to low, partially cover, and simmer for 2 1/2 hours or until meat is tender.
4. Remove beef from the pot and transfer to a shallow baking dish. Reserve 3/4 cup of cooking liquid. Sprinkle salt and pepper over the meat, then spread marmalade on top. Return reserved cooking liquid to the pan.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F. Bake for 25 minutes, basting occasionally.
Per serving: 476 calories, 31 grams fat, 157 milligrams cholesterol.
